DOWNFALLU-BRAWL_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, apply [blue]1[/blue] Bruise to ALL enemies.

DOWNFALLU-CHEAT_POWER.description: Your next card will trigger its [gold]Dead On[/gold] effect. No matter if it has [gold]Dead On[/gold] or not, this power will be consumed after a card is played.

DOWNFALLU-COMBO_POWER.description: The first [gold]Dead On[/gold] Attack or Skill triggered this turn will be put back into your hand.

DOWNFALLU-CONCENTRATION_POWER.descriptio: The next [gold]Dead On[/gold] Attack or Skill you play this turn triggers its effect regardless of position.
